ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "head_teacher" TEXT /* Name of the head teacher */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region the school belongs to */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., primary, secondary, special needs) */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the school was established */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of pupils the school can accommodate */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of pupils enrolled */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last school inspection */,
  "inspection_rating" TEXT /* Rating from the last school inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_types" (
  "funding_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of funding */,
  "funding_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the funding type is currently active */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for eligibility */,
  "max_amount" REAL /* Maximum funding limit for each type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_stages" (
  "key_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Key Stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the Key Stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Key Stage */,
  "start_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the Key Stage */,
  "end_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the Key Stage */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Key Stage is mandatory for all schools */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pupil_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pupil allocation */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "pupil_count" INTEGER /* Number of pupils */,
  "key_stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Key Stage */,
  "funding_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of funding */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for the allocation */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Who approved the allocation */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional information or notes about the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pupil_allocations_key_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_stage_id") REFERENCES key_stages ("key_stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pupil_allocations_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pupil_allocations_funding_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_type_id") REFERENCES funding_types ("funding_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding rate */,
  "funding_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of funding */,
  "key_stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Key Stage */,
  "rate_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding per pupil */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the rate */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* End date for the rate */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rate is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rates_funding_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_type_id") REFERENCES funding_types ("funding_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rates_key_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_stage_id") REFERENCES key_stages ("key_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding request */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school submitting the request */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the request was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the funding request */,
  "request_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding requested */,
  "justification" TEXT /* Detailed justification for the request */,
  "approved_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding approved */,
  "denied_reason" TEXT /* Reason if the request was denied */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Who last updated the request */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_requests_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deprivation_bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deprivation band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the band */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the band */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the band is currently active */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for the band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fsm_bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FSM band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the band */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the band */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the band is currently active */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for the band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_deprivation" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deprivation band */,
  "funding_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of funding */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the association */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* End date for the association */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the association is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_deprivation_funding_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_type_id") REFERENCES funding_types ("funding_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_deprivation_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES deprivation_bands ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_deprivation_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_fsm" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FSM band */,
  "funding_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of funding */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the association */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* End date for the association */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the association is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_fsm_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_fsm_funding_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_type_id") REFERENCES funding_types ("funding_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_fsm_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES fsm_bands ("band_id")
)
